issues.description: Trigger 'Trigger' is invalid. Must be one of: OnPlay, OnAttack, OnAttacked, OnKO, OnBlock, Counter, Activated, StartOfTurn, EndOfTurn

Action type 'TrashFromHand' is invalid. Must be one of: DrawCard, KO, ReturnToHand, PowerBoost, ForceDiscard, AddLife, GiveDon, FlipLife, AttachDon, GiveKeyword, Rest, RemoveLife, PlaySelf, SearchDeck, PlayFromHand, RevealFromHand, Win
